use_cases: Animated background for hero sections on landing pages
Interactive gradient effect for full-page layouts
Visual enhancement for SaaS product showcases
Dynamic background for marketing and promotional content
Eye-catching gradient animation for portfolio sites
ai_summary: A full-page gradient animation background component with interactive mouse-following effects. Supports multiple customizable colors, blending modes, and smooth transitions. The component creates a modern, animated backdrop that responds to user cursor movement, making it ideal for hero sections, landing pages, and visual-heavy interfaces.
